changes.description: Remove pb-20 from container div, let layout control bottom spacing
changes.rationale: Layout main has pb-16 for bottom-nav. Adding pb-20 on inner container creates ~9rem dead space. Let layout control bottom spacing.
changes.region: line 85: change className from pb-20 bg-black to bg-black

changes.description: Fix i18n replaceAll workaround by passing real count number
changes.rationale: Template {count} treinos no mes already accepts number. Passing empty string then stripping ': ' is fragile. Use real aluno.treinosNoMes.
changes.region: lines 140-141: replace t() call with replaceAll(': ','').trim() with t('dashboard.workoutsThisMonth', { count: aluno.treinosNoMes })

changes.description: Remove fake Meta Semanal and Power Index stats grid including divider
changes.rationale: Both values 80% and 752 are fabricated constants with no backend. Remove divider line and grid. Real data (XP, level, progress ring) stays.
changes.region: lines 223-239: remove divider div and grid-cols-2 block

changes.description: Remove inert Ver Todas Button from achievements section
changes.rationale: Button has no onClick, no href, no /aluno/conquistas route exists. Inert button is clear UX failure. Remove it.
changes.region: lines 258-263: remove Button variant ghost block

testChanges.description: Update workoutThisMonth mock to return correct template format without replaceAll
Remove assertions for Ver Todas button and Meta Semanal/Power Index text
